title: Claude is down for many — here's what we know about the outage
summary: Claude experienced a significant global service disruption on June 2 affecting users across the web interface, mobile app, API, and developer tools including Claude Code. Anthropic first flagged the issue at 06:04 UTC, identified the root cause at 06:39 UTC, and resolved the incident later that day.

title: Anthropic files to go public
summary: Anthropic, maker of the chatbot Claude, filed confidential paperwork with federal regulators on June 1, 2026 in preparation for selling its stock to the public. The company raised $65 billion in a recent funding round, bringing its valuation to $965 billion, and is now booking annualized revenue of $47 billion.

title: Expanding Project Glasswing
summary: Anthropic이 Project Glasswing을 확대해 Claude Mythos 프리뷰를 15개국 이상 약 150개 신규 조직에 개방했다. 중요 인프라 영역까지 적용 범위가 넓어졌다.

title: Claude AI Down for Users as Anthropic Confirms Outage
summary: Claude AI experienced a service disruption on June 2, 2026, with Anthropic confirming elevated error rates across multiple Claude services while engineers worked on a fix. Starting early morning users worldwide reported failed prompts, slow loading times, and blank responses.
